Layer.RefreshCommand: % function(self) if not GAMESTATE:IsEventMode() and GAMESTATE:GetCoinMode()==COIN_MODE_PAY then local credits=math.floor(GAMESTATE:GetCoins()/PREFSMAN:GetPreference('CoinsPerCredit')) local remainder=math.mod(GAMESTATE:GetCoins(),PREFSMAN:GetPreference('CoinsPerCredit')) local s='CREDITS: ' if credits>0 then s=s..credits..' ' end s=s..remainder..'/'..PREFSMAN:GetPreference('CoinsPerCredit') self:settext(s) end end
